title: Codereview pass 1: Python OSCORE seqnum - implementation correct
description:
Review of sender_sequence_number overflow fix in python/src/lichen/crypto/oscore.py:

**Findings:**
- Correctly imports MAX_SEQNO (2^40-1) and ContextUnavailable from aiocoap.oscore
- Check placement (before increment) matches RFC 8613 and aiocoap reference
- Exception type matches aiocoap's convention for exhausted contexts
- SECURITY comment explains the RFC requirement appropriately
- Now calls post_seqnoincrease() after increment, matching aiocoap behavior

**Status:** No defects found in pass 1.
